username.title: Username
username.description: Rasa.io account email address used for Basic auth when obtaining JWT tokens

password.title: Password
password.description: Rasa.io account password used for Basic auth when obtaining JWT tokens

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Rasa.io API key (UUID format) included in the token request body

communityIdentifier.title: Community Identifier
communityIdentifier.description: Optional Rasa.io community identifier to scope API calls to a specific newsletter community
